title: dryopteris pectinata
intro: Dryopteris pectinata, also known as the veiny buckler fern, is a species of fern native to China, Japan, and parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris pectinata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in capsule or powder form to harness its medicinal properties.
